en: Moreover, Ahithophel said to Absalom, "Let me choose twelve thousand men, and I will arise and pursue David tonight.
zh: 亞希多弗又對押沙龍說：“求你准我挑選一萬二千人，今晚我要動身去追趕大衛，

en: I will come upon him while he is weary and discouraged and throw him into a panic, and all the people who are with him will flee. I will strike down only the king,
zh: 趁他疲乏手軟的時候，忽然追上他，使他驚惶失措，與他在一起的人就必逃跑；我只要單單擊殺王一人，

en: and I will bring all the people back to you as a bride comes home to her husband. You seek the life of only one man, and all the people will be at peace."
zh: 使眾人都來歸你，好像新娘歸回丈夫那裡一樣。你所尋索的不過是一個人的性命，眾人會平安無事 。”

en: And the advice seemed right in the eyes of Absalom and all the elders of Israel.
zh: 押沙龍和以色列的眾長老都看這事為美。

en: Then Absalom said, "Call Hushai the Archite also, and let us hear what he has to say."
zh: 押沙龍說：“把亞基人戶篩召來，我們也聽聽他怎麼說。”

en: And when Hushai came to Absalom, Absalom said to him, "Thus has Ahithophel spoken; shall we do as he says? If not, you speak."
zh: 於是戶篩來見押沙龍，押沙龍問他說：“亞希多弗說了這樣的話，我們可以照著他的話去行嗎？如果不可以，請你提議吧！”

en: Then Hushai said to Absalom, "This time the counsel that Ahithophel has given is not good."
zh: 戶篩回答押沙龍：“亞希多弗這次計劃的謀略不好。”

en: Hushai said, "You know that your father and his men are mighty men, and that they are enraged, like a bear robbed of her cubs in the field. Besides, your father is expert in war; he will not spend the night with the people.
zh: 戶篩又說：“你知道你父親和那些跟隨他的人都是勇士；他們心裡正在惱怒，好像野地裡喪子的母熊一樣；並且你父親是個戰士，必不會與眾人在一起住宿。

en: Behold, even now he has hidden himself in one of the pits or in some other place. And as soon as some of the people fall at the first attack, whoever hears it will say, 'There has been a slaughter among the people who follow Absalom.'
zh: 現在他或躺在一個坑中，或在另一個地方，如果他首先攻擊你的手下，聽見的人就必說：‘跟從押沙龍的人被殺了！’

en: Then even the valiant man, whose heart is like the heart of a lion, will utterly melt with fear, for all Israel knows that your father is a mighty man, and that those who are with him are valiant men.
zh: 那時，縱使有人像獅子一般勇敢，心裡也必驚慌，因為全以色列都知道你父親是個勇士，跟隨他的人都是英勇的人。

en: But my counsel is that all Israel be gathered to you, from Dan to Beersheba, as the sand by the sea for multitude, and that you go to battle in person.
zh: 因此，我建議把以色列眾人，從但到別是巴，都聚集到你這裡來，好像海邊的沙那樣多，然後你親自率領他們上戰場。

en: So we shall come upon him in some place where he is to be found, and we shall light upon him as the dew falls on the ground, and of him and all the men with him not one will be left.
zh: 無論我們在哪一個地方找到大衛，就攻擊他；我們臨到他，像露水降在地上一樣。這樣，他和跟隨他的人，就一個也不會留下。

en: If he withdraws into a city, then all Israel will bring ropes to that city, and we shall drag it into the valley, until not even a pebble is to be found there."
zh: 如果他退入城裡去，以色列眾人就要帶繩子到那城去，我們要把那城拉到河裡去，使那裡連一塊小石頭也找不到。”

en: And Absalom and all the men of Israel said, "The counsel of Hushai the Archite is better than the counsel of Ahithophel." For the LORD had ordained to defeat the good counsel of Ahithophel, so that the LORD might bring harm upon Absalom.
zh: 押沙龍和以色列眾人都說：“亞基人戶篩的謀略比亞希多弗的好。”因為耶和華定意要破壞亞希多弗的好計謀，為要降災禍給押沙龍。

en: Then Hushai said to Zadok and Abiathar the priests, "Thus and so did Ahithophel counsel Absalom and the elders of Israel, and thus and so have I counseled.
zh: 於是戶篩對撒督祭司和亞比亞他說：“亞希多弗為押沙龍和以色列的眾長老所策定的謀略是這樣這樣的，我所策定的謀略又是這樣這樣的。

en: Now therefore send quickly and tell David, 'Do not stay tonight at the fords of the wilderness, but by all means pass over, lest the king and all the people who are with him be swallowed up.'"
zh: 現在你們要趕快派人去告訴大衛：‘今天晚上你不可在曠野的渡口住宿，務要過河，免得王和跟隨他的眾人都被吞滅。’”

en: Now Jonathan and Ahimaaz were waiting at En-rogel. A female servant was to go and tell them, and they were to go and tell King David, for they were not to be seen entering the city.
zh: 那時，約拿單和亞希瑪斯停留在隱．羅結，他們不敢進城，怕被人看見。有一個婢女經常出來，把話告訴他們，然後他們再去告訴大衛王。

en: But a young man saw them and told Absalom. So both of them went away quickly and came to the house of a man at Bahurim, who had a well in his courtyard. And they went down into it.
zh: 但有一個僕人看見他們，就去告訴押沙龍。因此，他們兩人急忙離開那裡，來到巴戶琳某人的家裡；那人的院子裡有一口井，他們就下到井裡。

en: And the woman took and spread a covering over the well's mouth and scattered grain on it, and nothing was known of it.
zh: 那家的主婦拿了一塊大布，蓋在井口上，又在上面鋪了一些麥子，所以沒有人知道這件事。

en: When Absalom's servants came to the woman at the house, they said, "Where are Ahimaaz and Jonathan?" And the woman said to them, "They have gone over the brook of water." And when they had sought and could not find them, they returned to Jerusalem.
zh: 押沙龍的臣僕到這家來見那婦人，問她：“亞希瑪斯和約拿單在哪裡？”那婦人回答他們說：“他們已經過了河了。”於是臣僕搜索他們，卻沒有找著，就都回耶路撒冷去了。

en: After they had gone, the men came up out of the well, and went and told King David. They said to David, "Arise, and go quickly over the water, for thus and so has Ahithophel counseled against you."
zh: 他們走了以後，兩人從井裡上來，去告訴大衛王，對大衛說：“你們要起來，趕快過河，因為亞希多弗已經定了這樣這樣的謀略攻擊你們。”

en: Then David arose, and all the people who were with him, and they crossed the Jordan. By daybreak not one was left who had not crossed the Jordan.
zh: 於是大衛和跟隨他的眾人都起來，渡過約旦河；到了天亮，沒有一人還沒有渡過約旦河的。

en: When Ahithophel saw that his counsel was not followed, he saddled his donkey and went off home to his own city. He set his house in order and hanged himself, and he died and was buried in the tomb of his father.
zh: 亞希多弗見自己的謀略不被採納，就預備了驢子，起程往本城自己的家去。他安排好了家裡的事，就上吊死了，埋葬在他父親的墳墓裡。

en: Then David came to Mahanaim. And Absalom crossed the Jordan with all the men of Israel.
zh: 大衛到了瑪哈念，押沙龍和跟隨他的以色列眾人也都過了約旦河。

en: Now Absalom had set Amasa over the army instead of Joab. Amasa was the son of a man named Ithra the Ishmaelite, who had married Abigal the daughter of Nahash, sister of Zeruiah, Joab's mother.
zh: 押沙龍派亞瑪撒統率軍隊，取代約押。亞瑪撒是以實瑪利人 以特拉的兒子。以特拉曾經與拿轄的女兒亞比該親近過；亞比該和約押的母親洗魯雅是姊妹。

en: And Israel and Absalom encamped in the land of Gilead.
zh: 以色列人和押沙龍都在基列地安營。

en: When David came to Mahanaim, Shobi the son of Nahash from Rabbah of the Ammonites, and Machir the son of Ammiel from Lo-debar, and Barzillai the Gileadite from Rogelim,
zh: 大衛到了瑪哈念的時候，亞捫族的拉巴人拿轄的兒子朔比、羅．底巴人亞米利的兒子瑪吉、基列的羅基琳人巴西萊，

en: brought beds, basins, and earthen vessels, wheat, barley, flour, parched grain, beans and lentils,
zh: 帶來寢具、碗盆、瓦器、小麥、大麥、麵粉、炒麥、豆子、紅豆、炒豆、

en: honey and curds and sheep and cheese from the herd, for David and the people with him to eat, for they said, "The people are hungry and weary and thirsty in the wilderness."
zh: 蜂蜜、奶油、綿羊和乳酪送給大衛和跟隨他的人吃，因為他們說：“這些人在曠野一定又飢餓，又疲倦，又口渴了。”
